<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get all settlements by account ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/accounts/{accountId}/settlements"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



    Get a list of settlements by account ID.

    ### Permissions
    * `settlement:read`
